plugin.name: ChaosCast
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Tracks chaos portal casts - normal vs golden
plugin.description: Tracks how many chaos portals you cast, and what percentage are normal vs golden. Commands: chaoscast - Show stats chaoscast help - Show help chaoscast reset - Reset stats

trigger.match: With a blinding flash of light, you have created a chaos portal!
trigger.name: chaos_normal

trigger.match: The chaos portal flares with a golden aura!
trigger.name: chaos_golden

muclient.script:
require "wait"
-- ───────────────────────────────────────────── -- ChaosCast - MushClient Plugin -- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
local dataFile = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 6) .. "ChaosCast.dat"
local stats = { total = 0, normal = 0, golden = 0, continent = 0, area = 0 } local pendingGolden = false local gtBroadcast = true -- gt broadcast toggle
local CONTINENTS = { ["alagh, the blood lands"] = true, ["gelidus"] = true, ["the continent of mesolar"] = true, ["the dark continent, abend"] = true, ["the southern ocean"] = true, ["the uncharted oceans"] = true, ["vidblain, the ever dark"] = true, }
local function IsContinent(area) return CONTINENTS[area:lower()] == true end
-- ─── Persistence ─────────────────────────────
local function SaveData() local f = io.open(dataFile, "w") if f then f:write(string.format("total=%d\nnormal=%d\ngolden=%d\ngtbroadcast=%d\ncontinent=%d\narea=%d\n", stats.total, stats.normal, stats.golden, gtBroadcast and 1 or 0, stats.continent, stats.area)) f:close() end end
local function LoadData() local f = io.open(dataFile, "r") if f then for line in f:lines() do local k, v = line:match("^(%a+)=(%d+)$") if k and v then if k == "total" or k == "normal" or k == "golden" or k == "continent" or k == "area" then stats[k] = tonumber(v) elseif k == "gtbroadcast" then gtBroadcast = (tonumber(v) == 1) end end end f:close() end end
-- ─── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────
local function Pct(part, total) if total == 0 then return "0", "00" end local p = (part / total) * 100 local whole = math.floor(p) local frac = math.floor((p - whole) * 100) return string.format("%d", whole), string.format("%02d", frac) end
-- Shorthand: ColourNote takes (fg, bg, text, fg, bg, text, ...) -- colour names: "white", "red", "cyan", "green", "black" local BG = "black"
local function CN(...) ColourNote(...) end
-- ─── Display ─────────────────────────────────
local function ShowStats() local nW, nF = Pct(stats.normal, stats.total) local gW, gF = Pct(stats.golden, stats.total) local cW, cF = Pct(stats.continent, stats.total) local aW, aF = Pct(stats.area, stats.total)
CN("green", BG, "Chaos Portals Cast")
CN("white", BG, "Total Portals: ", "red", BG, tostring(stats.total))
CN("white", BG, "Normal Portals: ", "red", BG, tostring(stats.normal), "white", BG, " (", "cyan", BG, nW, "white", BG, ".", "cyan", BG, nF, "white", BG, "%)")
CN("white", BG, "Golden Portals: ", "red", BG, tostring(stats.golden), "white", BG, " (", "cyan", BG, gW, "white", BG, ".", "cyan", BG, gF, "white", BG, "%)")
CN("white", BG, "Continent Lands: ", "red", BG, tostring(stats.continent), "white", BG, " (", "cyan", BG, cW, "white", BG, ".", "cyan", BG, cF, "white", BG, "%)")
CN("white", BG, "Area Lands: ", "red", BG, tostring(stats.area), "white", BG, " (", "cyan", BG, aW, "white", BG, ".", "cyan", BG, aF, "white", BG, "%)") end
local function ShowHelp() CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast Help") CN("white", BG, "chaoscast ", "cyan", BG, "- Show portal cast statistics") CN("white", BG, "chaoscast help ", "cyan", BG, "- Show this help message") CN("white", BG, "chaoscast reset ", "cyan", BG, "- Reset all statistics") CN("white", BG, "chaoscastbc ", "cyan", BG, "- Toggle gt broadcast on/off") CN("white", BG, "chaoscast <channel> ", "cyan", BG, "- Broadcast stats to a channel (eg: chaoscast gt)") CN("white", BG, "bcp <number> ", "cyan", BG, "- Cast chaos blank X times with 1 second delay (eg: bcp 10)") CN("white", BG, "bcpstop ", "cyan", BG, "- Stop an in-progress BCP run") Note("") CN("green", BG, "RaviTrack") CN("white", BG, "ravitrack ", "cyan", BG, "- Show Ravi portal purchase statistics") CN("white", BG, "ravitrack help ", "cyan", BG, "- Show RaviTrack help") CN("white", BG, "ravitrack reset ", "cyan", BG, "- Reset Ravi purchase stats") CN("white", BG, "ravitrack <channel> ", "cyan", BG, "- Broadcast Ravi stats to a channel (eg: ravitrack gt)") end
-- ─── Trigger Handlers ────────────────────────
function OnNormalPortal(name, line, wildcards) pendingGolden = false end
function OnGoldenPortal(name, line, wildcards) pendingGolden = true end
function OnPortalDestination(name, line, wildcards) local room = wildcards[1] local area = wildcards[2] local isGolden = pendingGolden pendingGolden = false
stats.total = stats.total + 1 if isGolden then stats.golden = stats.golden + 1 else stats.normal = stats.normal + 1 end if IsContinent(area) then stats.continent = stats.continent + 1 else stats.area = stats.area + 1 end SaveData()
local goldFlag = isGolden and "Y" or "N"
if gtBroadcast then local goldCode = isGolden and "@x048" or "@x099" Execute("gt @WArea: @x048" .. area .. "@x045 | @WRoom: @x048" .. room .. "@x045 | @YGold: " .. goldCode .. goldFlag .. "@w") end end
-- ─── BCP Bulk Cast ───────────────────────────
local bcp = { total = 0 }
function BcpTick() end -- unused
function OnBcpCast(name, line, wildcards) local n = tonumber(wildcards[1]) if not n or n < 1 then CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast: ", "white", BG, "Usage: bcp <number> eg: bcp 10") return end
bcp.total = n
CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast: ", "white", BG, "Starting BCP — casting ", "red", BG, tostring(n), "white", BG, " portals with a 1 second delay each.")
wait.make(function() for i = 1, n do Execute("c chaos blank") wait.time(1000) end CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast: ", "white", BG, "BCP complete. Cast ", "red", BG, tostring(n), "white", BG, " portals.") end) end
function OnBcpStop(name, line, wildcards) CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast: ", "white", BG, "BCP stopped.") wait.cancel_all() end
function OnChaosCastDisplay(name, line, wildcards) ShowStats() end
function OnChaosCastHelp(name, line, wildcards) ShowHelp() end
function OnChaosCastChannel(name, line, wildcards) local channel = wildcards[1]
-- Don't intercept reserved commands if channel == "help" or channel == "reset" then return end
local nW, nF = Pct(stats.normal, stats.total) local gW, gF = Pct(stats.golden, stats.total) local cW, cF = Pct(stats.continent, stats.total) local aW, aF = Pct(stats.area, stats.total)
local msg = "@WChaos Portals @x048Total: @x099" .. stats.total .. "@x045 | @WNormal: @x099" .. stats.normal .. "@W (@x048" .. nW .. "@W.@x048" .. nF .. "@W%)" .. "@x045 | @WGolden: @x099" .. stats.golden .. "@W (@x048" .. gW .. "@W.@x048" .. gF .. "@W%)" .. "@x045 | @WContinent: @x099" .. stats.continent .. "@W (@x048" .. cW .. "@W.@x048" .. cF .. "@W%)" .. "@x045 | @WArea: @x099" .. stats.area .. "@W (@x048" .. aW .. "@W.@x048" .. aF .. "@W%)@w"
Execute(channel .. " " .. msg) end
function OnChaosCastGtToggle(name, line, wildcards) gtBroadcast = not gtBroadcast SaveData() if gtBroadcast then CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast: ", "white", BG, "gt broadcast ", "green", BG, "ENABLED") else CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast: ", "white", BG, "gt broadcast ", "red", BG, "DISABLED") end end
function OnChaosCastReset(name, line, wildcards) stats.total = 0 stats.normal = 0 stats.golden = 0 stats.continent = 0 stats.area = 0 SaveData() CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast: ", "white", BG, "Stats have been reset.") end
-- ─── Plugin Lifecycle ────────────────────────
function OnPluginInstall() LoadData() ravi_load_data() CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast loaded. Type 'chaoscast help' for commands.") end
function OnPluginConnect() LoadData() ravi_load_data() end
function OnPluginSaveState() SaveData() ravi_save_data() end
-- ───────────────────────────────────────────── -- RaviTrack - merged into ChaosCast -- ─────────────────────────────────────────────
local ravi_data_file = "RaviTrack.dat"
local RAVI_TYPES = { "a blank chaos portal", "A blank chaos portal with a silvery tint", "A shiny platinum blank chaos portal", "A glittering diamond blank chaos portal", }
local ravi_counts = { ["a blank chaos portal"] = 0, ["A blank chaos portal with a silvery tint"] = 0, ["A shiny platinum blank chaos portal"] = 0, ["A glittering diamond blank chaos portal"] = 0, }
function ravi_save_data() local f = io.open(ravi_data_file, "w") if not f then return end for k, v in pairs(ravi_counts) do f:write(k .. "|" .. tostring(v) .. "\n") end f:close() end
function ravi_load_data() local f = io.open(ravi_data_file, "r") if not f then return end for line in f:lines() do local name, num = line:match("^(.*)|(%d+)$") if name and num and ravi_counts[name] ~= nil then ravi_counts[name] = tonumber(num) end end f:close() end
function OnRaviBuy(name, line, wildcards) local portal = wildcards[1] if ravi_counts[portal] ~= nil then ravi_counts[portal] = ravi_counts[portal] + 1 ravi_save_data() end end
function OnRaviTrack() local total = 0 for _, v in pairs(ravi_counts) do total = total + v end
local function pctParts(amt) if total == 0 then return "0", "00" end local p = (amt / total) * 100 local whole = math.floor(p) local frac = math.floor((p - whole) * 100) return string.format("%d", whole), string.format("%02d", frac) end
local blank = ravi_counts["a blank chaos portal"] local silver = ravi_counts["A blank chaos portal with a silvery tint"] local platinum = ravi_counts["A shiny platinum blank chaos portal"] local diamond = ravi_counts["A glittering diamond blank chaos portal"]
CN("green", BG, "Ravi Portal Tracker")
CN("white", BG, "Total Portals: ", "red", BG, tostring(total))
local function RaviLine(label, amt) local w, f = pctParts(amt) CN("white", BG, label .. ": ", "red", BG, tostring(amt), "white", BG, " (", "cyan", BG, w, "white", BG, ".", "cyan", BG, f, "white", BG, "%)") end
RaviLine("Blank", blank) RaviLine("Silver", silver) RaviLine("Platinum", platinum) RaviLine("Diamond", diamond) end
function OnRaviChannel(name, line, wildcards) local channel = wildcards[1] if channel == "help" or channel == "reset" then return end
local total = 0 for _, v in pairs(ravi_counts) do total = total + v end
local blank = ravi_counts["a blank chaos portal"] local silver = ravi_counts["A blank chaos portal with a silvery tint"] local platinum = ravi_counts["A shiny platinum blank chaos portal"] local diamond = ravi_counts["A glittering diamond blank chaos portal"]
local function P(amt) local w, f = Pct(amt, total) return "@W (@x048" .. w .. "@W.@x048" .. f .. "@W%)" end
local msg = "@WRavi Track @x045| @WTotal: @x099" .. tostring(total) .. "@x045 | @WBlank: @x099" .. tostring(blank) .. P(blank) .. "@x045 | @WSilver: @x099" .. tostring(silver) .. P(silver) .. "@x045 | @WPlatinum: @x099" .. tostring(platinum) .. P(platinum) .. "@x045 | @WDiamond: @x099" .. tostring(diamond) .. P(diamond) .. "@w"
Execute(channel .. " " .. msg) end
function OnRaviReset() for k, _ in pairs(ravi_counts) do ravi_counts[k] = 0 end ravi_save_data() CN("green", BG, "ChaosCast: ", "white", BG, "Ravi portal stats reset.") end
function OnRaviHelp() CN("green", BG, "RaviTrack Help") CN("white", BG, "ravitrack ", "cyan", BG, "- Show Ravi portal purchase statistics") CN("white", BG, "ravitrack help ", "cyan", BG, "- Show this help") CN("white", BG, "ravitrack reset ", "cyan", BG, "- Reset all counts") CN("white", BG, "ravitrack <channel> ", "cyan", BG, "- Broadcast stats to a channel (eg: ravitrack gt)") end
